subcodes.first_line: O Sakína! The ocean of utterance surgeth before all faces, and the Sun of mystic knowledge blazeth forth resplendent from the horizon of the world, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سکینه بحر بیان امام وجوه مواج و نیر عرفان از افق عالم ساطع و هویدا ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
